subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen yearneth to make mention of all the servants of God, both men and women, yet hath been hindered through oppression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم الاعلی یحب ان یذکر عباد الله و امائه کلهم و کلها ولکن منع بالظلم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
